purpose: A delta_t=0 rule end-to-end: the explicit '<-0' rule fires in the SAME timestep its body fact applies (flag(A) already [1,1] in the t=0 frame; trace row at Time 0, fixed-point operation 1), while the '<-1' chain rule downstream fires one timestep later (chain(A) from the t=1 frame on) — the zero-delta firing schedule the delta classes' fingerprint arms cannot observe.
provenance: docs/surface.md dsl:rule-text bound-zero-delta-default/happy-delta-t e2e widening; rule_parser.py:51-64 at the pin; firing schedule screened live 2026-07-12 (4 fresh pin processes, digest-stable)
